allow: Bash(cmd /c "where npx 2>&1 & where node 2>&1 & where python 2>&1")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command npx, node, python, python3, http-server -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source")
Bash(gh pr create --title 'Phase 1: multi-user data isolation \(RLS + user_id filters\)' --body ' *)
